gateSet.summary: cargo test passed for the patch candidate before re-package
cargo clippy passed with warnings denied before re-package
declared evaluator gates passed without automated fun or quality claims
baseline comparison and provenance refs are deterministic and current
save compatibility is verified before re-package
Steam desktop export descriptor can be derived in local dry-run mode

generatedStatePolicy: Generated patch runs, package descriptors, and builds remain untracked unless fixture-scoped.
boundary: Patch re-verify reuses existing web runtime and Steam export; Rust/local owns trusted validation; browser/Studio/Electron/Steamworks surfaces are read-only with no direct trusted writes; release remains human/Ring-3 with no Release button automation; not Layer-3 cloud/mobile.
